scripts.dev: concurrently -n shared,server,web -c cyan,green,magenta "yarn workspace @squadroom/shared build --watch" "yarn workspace @squadroom/server dev" "yarn workspace web dev --host"
scripts.build:web: yarn workspace @squadroom/shared build && yarn workspace web build
scripts.build:server: yarn workspace @squadroom/shared build && yarn workspace @squadroom/server build
scripts.build: yarn workspace @squadroom/shared build && yarn workspace web build && yarn workspace @squadroom/server build
